name: sprint-protocol
description: Codex-native sprint protocol for research, story writing, review, implementation, verification, and PR handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Run reliable Codex sprints from research to PR.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-optimized sprint operating system. It turns large product or engineering goals into durable sprint artifacts, uses Codex subagents for research, story writing, implementation, review, and verification, keeps long-running work resumable through files and plans, and can hand verification to dedicated ProofOps or GitHub/Vercel skills when available.
defaultPrompt: Use Sprint Protocol to research and plan this work.
Use Sprint Protocol to write and review stories.
Use Sprint Protocol to execute and verify this sprint.
